summary: Generated project-specific Codex suggestions by combining DinoBrain context, local git branch state, current main/tag state, GitHub PR activity, and available connector signals. Strong candidates centered on an unmerged observatory branch and a fresh hook-fix PR that is still open against an older main.
decisions: Used DinoBrain context plus local git/GitHub evidence as primary signals.
Excluded Gmail-based suggestions because the connected Gmail search scope is insufficient.
Excluded calendar-based suggestions because no project-related upcoming events were found.
Kept only suggestions tied to fresh unresolved repo work, not already-landed tasks.
next_steps: Return up to three suggestions in the requested schema.
